extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won the field sprint after catching the four-man breakaway in the final 50 meters, outsprinting MEEUS Jordi on the line.
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange-Jayco chased for third consecutive stage for GROENEWEGEN Dylan, suggesting overcommitment to a sprinter struggling with climbing.
Breakaway quartet played poker in final kilometer instead of committing to rotation, allowing peloton to close 15-second gap.
VAN AERT had to navigate around LAPORTE Christophe in sprint, indicating Jumbo-Visma lacked organized leadout despite controlling chase.

rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: BikeExchange-Jayco chased three stages for him without delivery, team reportedly growing frustrated with lack of results
rider_signals.BACKLUND Axel: neutral: former Tour/Dauphiné stage winner animated breakaway but hesitated critically in final kilometer poker game
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: extended GC lead to 1:03 via bonus seconds, showing sprint speed after controlling chase work
rider_signals.MEEUS Jordi: positive: sprinted faster than Van Aert (70+ km/h) coming from behind, banged bars in frustration suggesting near-miss
